summary:
Excellent! The fix worked. The issue was an off-by-one error in the `processor.py` file, where the `end` index for slicing was incorrectly calculated as `start + batch_size - 1`. By changing it to `start + batch_size`, the slicing now correctly includes all elements in each batch, ensuring no records are dropped during processing.

The test script confirms that all records are now processed correctly across different batch sizes and boundaries.
